prompt: A person lying unconscious on the ground suddenly snaps their eyes open and gasps sharply, chest heaving upward. After a moment of frozen shock, they begin a slow, agonizing struggle to rise. They push the ground with trembling arms, their body feeling heavy and uncoordinated. As they transition to a seated position, they reach up with a shaky hand to clutch their throbbing head, wincing in intense pain with a slight stagger in their posture.
